title: The First Meeting
description: ❤️ I still remember our very first meeting in the main building. The moment I saw you walking, it felt like time had stopped. 🌸 You looked so beautiful that I completely lost myself in that moment. Our very first eye contact is something I'll cherish forever—it was quiet, magical, and unforgettable. ✨ From that instant, all I wanted was to find a reason to talk to you, even if it was just for a few seconds. Little did I know that one simple moment would become the beginning of the most beautiful love story of my life.
quote: The day I met Kashish, my ordinary life became extraordinary.

title: Our First Message
description: I couldn't wait to text you. A simple 'Hey' turned into an all-night conversation. Typing and retyping messages, smiling at my screen, and staying up. That chat began a beautiful habit.
quote: Sometimes, a simple message becomes the start of a lifetime.

title: Our First Call
description: Hearing your voice through the phone for the first time. What was supposed to be a 'quick five-minute call' lasted five hours. We laughed about the silliest things and talked about our childhood dreams. Hearing you say my name felt like music.
quote: Hearing Kashish's voice for the first time felt like coming home.

title: Our First Video Call
description: Seeing your face on screen, lit up by the warm glow of your lamp. You were sitting on your hostel stairs, wearing comfortable pyjamas, and looking absolutely beautiful without even trying. Distance didn't matter when you smiled at me like that.
quote: Screen distances faded whenever Kashish smiled through my phone.

title: Our First Date
description: The day my eyes met yours , Kashish. You wore that white sweat-shirt and blue jeans, and time seemed to slow down. I was so nervous talking to you, but your laugh made me feel instantly at home. That was the moment everything changed.
quote: Every moment with Kashish became a page I never want to stop reading.

title: Our First Selfie
description: 📸 Our First Selfie 💕One frame, two smiles, and a million emotions. 🥹❤️ As we stood close together, I realized I never wanted to stand anywhere else. That little selfie became the first page of our beautiful love story. 🌸✨
quote: In a simple photo, I saw our entire future together.

title: Our Funniest Memories
description: 🎬 P&N Mall gave us one of my favorite memories. From our first movie together 🍿 to endless conversations, silly laughter 😂, and countless photos 📸 on that little bench, every moment felt magical. Even our tiny argument turned into another reason to understand and love each other more. ❤️ Looking back, I realize it wasn't just a day at the mall—it became one of the most beautiful and unforgettable memories of my life, simply because I was spending it with you, Kashish. 🌸✨
quote: Every smile of Kashish became my favorite reason to smile.

title: Festivals & Celebrations
description: Our first Sarasvati Pujan together will always be close to my heart.You looked absolutely radiant in that yellow kurta,brighter than the festival itself. ✨ Between endless conversations 🥹, stolen pictures 📸, and secretly watching out for the warden 👀😂, every moment felt like a beautiful adventure. And before anything else, I made sure the prasad reached you first. 🙏❤️ Because making you smile has always been my favorite blessing. 💖🌸
quote: Kashish brings a celebration to my heart every single day.

title: Favorite Moments Together
description: 🌅 Our Favorite Sunset Ride ❤️I think one of your wishes came true that day, and that's why it's one of my favorite memories. 🏍️✨ The sunset was beautiful, but nothing compared to having you behind me yet I've never felt happier. 🥹💕 That simple ride became one of the most beautiful moments of my life because every road feels like home when I'm with you, Kashish. 🌸❤️
quote: Home isn't a place, Kashish. Home is wherever you are.

title: Forever Begins...
description: As I write this birthday surprise, I look forward to all the unwritten pages of our diary. SP spontaneous road trips, house hunts, quiet breakfast plates, and holding hands at eighty. This is just our beginning, my love.
quote: You are my today and all of my tomorrows, Kashish.
